utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final plan. Now check if each is fully specified with required details: (1) health_coverage requires physical and mental health insurance with costs—plan indicates physical & mental, includes monthly_cost and currency, so fully specified. (2) property_coverage requires home/contents insurance with costs—plan shows provider, plan_name, monthly_cost, currency; it implies home coverage but does not explicitly say contents; however the format asks 'home/contents insurance with costs' and the plan name 'Premium Coverage' under property likely suffices; costs present—accept as specified. (3) travel_coverage requires travel insurance with costs—provided with monthly_cost and currency. (4) additional_services requires any enhancement services with costs—provided with service_name, description, cost, currency. (5) total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown—provided total_monthly_cost, currency, previous_monthly_cost, monthly_savings; no annual numbers, but the item asks for monthly/annual cost breakdown; since only monthly is provided, this may be incomplete. Therefore 4 items are fully specified, and total_budget is missing annual breakdown.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to match each item in the final coverage plan to the exact item names in the ground-truth ratings. The plan lists: EliteCare Premium Package (Physical & Mental) under provider EliteCare; in the ratings, the matching items are 'EliteCare Premium Plan' in both primary_health_coverage.physical_health and mental_health. Property coverage lists 'EliteHome Premium Coverage', which exactly matches an entry. Travel coverage lists 'EliteTravel Premium Plan', which exactly matches an entry. The 'Retroactive Coverage Review' is not present in the ratings, so it should not be included. Therefore, we map: EliteCare Premium Plan (physical) -> rating 10, EliteCare Premium Plan (mental) -> rating 10, EliteHome Premium Coverage -> rating 10, EliteTravel Premium Plan -> rating 10.
